message.content:
@startuml
skinparam rectangle {
    BackgroundColor<<entity>> LightBlue
    BorderThickness 2
}

rectangle "Aggregate-Buch" as AggregateBuch <<aggregate>> {
    
    class Buch <<root entity>> #LightGreen
    
    class AutorID <<value object>> 
    note right of AutorID : value
    
    class BuchID <<value object>> 
    note left of BuchID : value
    
    class Kapitel <<entity>> 
    
    class KapitelID <<value object>> 
    note top of KapitelID : value
    
    enum Status <<enumeration>> 
    note bottom of Status : value
    
    ' Relationships from root to children using aggregation diamonds at source end pointing toward child nodes' arrows  
    Buch o---> AutorID   
    Buch -->|contains | BuchID     
    Buch --o> KapitellD       
    Buch -[hidden]-> KapiteLid      
        
     kapitel *--> kapitelli d         
      kapi tel -> status           
       bu ch ---- st atu s          
        au tor i D <|- b u c h            
         buch id <|---b uc h              
          ka pit el lI D <-|--ka pi te L               
           sta tus <--||-k apit eL                
            aut or ID ---< ||BUC H                 
             BU CH I D -----<>BUCH                  
              KA PITE LL ID ------><KAPITEL                   
               STATUS -------<<<KA PIT EL                    
                AUTORID -------->>>> BUCH                     
                 BOOKID ---------->>>BOOK                      
                  CHAPTERID -----------<<<<CHAPTER                       
                   STATUSS ------------<<<<<<<STATUS                        
                    AUTHORIDD ---------------->>>>>>>>AUTHOR                         
                     BOO KII DD -------------------->>>>>>>BO OK                          
                      C HA PT ER II IDD----------------------<<<<<<<<C H APTER                           
                       S T AT US SS------------------------------------>>>>>>>S TA TUSS                            
                        AU TH ORR IIDDD------------------------------------------>>>>>>>>A UT HO RR                                 

@enduml
